book.description: opaque Morpholog subject identifier or domain symbol. Subjects minted by `Stmt::LetNewSubject` are UUIDv7 by runtime convention; externally supplied Subjects (commodity codes, period names, direction enums, etc.) are opaque strings. The schema describes the shape, not a format constraint.

curve_version.description: opaque Morpholog subject identifier or domain symbol. Subjects minted by `Stmt::LetNewSubject` are UUIDv7 by runtime convention; externally supplied Subjects (commodity codes, period names, direction enums, etc.) are opaque strings. The schema describes the shape, not a format constraint.

mtm.description: exact decimal amount in EUR, carried as a string for exactness. The unit is fixed by the declaration (`Decimal[EUR]`) and is not sent with the value.

org.description: opaque Morpholog subject identifier or domain symbol. Subjects minted by `Stmt::LetNewSubject` are UUIDv7 by runtime convention; externally supplied Subjects (commodity codes, period names, direction enums, etc.) are opaque strings. The schema describes the shape, not a format constraint.

delivery_end.description: RFC 3339 UTC instant (e.g. 2026-10-24T14:00:00Z). Zone-less by design: local-time interpretation is admitted as claims, never assumed by the runtime.

delivery_start.description: RFC 3339 UTC instant (e.g. 2026-10-24T14:00:00Z). Zone-less by design: local-time interpretation is admitted as claims, never assumed by the runtime.

price.description: arbitrary-precision decimal carried as a string for exactness

quantity.description: exact decimal amount in MW, carried as a string for exactness. The unit is fixed by the declaration (`Decimal[MW]`) and is not sent with the value.
